notable_excerpts: We have improved our sustainability ratings overall, MSCI maintained, Sustainalytics improved, S&P Global improved. CDP improved and we are now a member of the sustainability year book on S&P Global.
We have taken a lot of synergy benefits that came with the acquisition of both Organic India and Capital foods.
Multiple measures have gone into place to make sure that this happens and this is sustainable.
We have brought down working capital very significantly from the 50 days where we started off.
EPS is nearly 2.5 times from where we started and operating cash flow, we are now 101% of EBITDA.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted improvements in sustainability ratings, indicating a focus on environmental responsibility. Social aspects were addressed through employee cost management and supply chain efficiency. Governance was strong with transparency in financial performance and risk management.
